title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Casey West demonstrates how to design a multi-agent system that bypasses LLM calls for deterministic tasks, using a before_model_callback pattern to route 1,000 agents through code-based logic rather than model inference. The example uses the Spine & Sprout algorithm for marathon route planning, eliminating nearly all LLM calls while maintaining agent orchestration on Google Cloud infrastructure.
